items.detail: 1308 total units in mission (threshold: 1200). Even late-activated units consume memory.
966 trigger zones (threshold: 90). Zones used in triggers are evaluated every frame.
CTLD detected in mission scripts. checkHoverStatus and checkAIStatus poll every 1–2s over all registered transport pilots — a steady CPU cost at scale.

26,726 non-blank lines of mission-specific Lua (frameworks excluded): Foothold_Localization.lua (16,983), foothold pg nya v2.lua (5,421), WelcomeMessage.lua (1,987), Foothold Config.lua (1,109), EWRS.lua (1,107), Zeus.lua (87), gm_bench.lua (32). Threshold: warning >5,000, critical >15,000.
